Question: Identify the graph of each of the following nondegenerate conic sections. ⓐ $$16 y^{2} - x^{2} + x - 4 y - 9 = 0$$ ⓑ $$16 x^{2} + 4 y^{2} + 16 x + 49 y - 81 = 0$$
Rewrite the $$13 x^{2} - 6 \sqrt{3} x y + 7 y^{2} = 16$$ in the $$x^{\prime} y^{\prime}$$ system without the $$x^{\prime} y^{\prime}$$ term.
Identify the conic for each of the following without rotating axes. ⓐ $$x^{2} - 9 x y + 3 y^{2} - 12 = 0$$ ⓑ $$10 x^{2} - 9 x y + 4 y^{2} - 4 = 0$$
